texto: Sometimes life isn't what you expect it to be, and you feel like giving up. But isn't life supposed to be full of challenges that will make us learn from our mistakes. And mistakes make us better people.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Raj Solith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes life isn't what you expect it to be, and you feel like giving up. But isn't life suppos…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, life-and-living, mistakes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
